cases.judge_reason: The response explicitly states: 'You have 30 days from the delivery date to start a return', which directly satisfies the criteria.
cases.response: You have 30 days from the delivery date to start a return [policy-returns-return-window]. The items need to be unworn and unused with original tags attached and original packaging included [policy-returns-return-window]. If you're ready to return something, just email support@auroraoutfitters.com with your order number and let us know which items you want to return [policy-returns-how-to-start-a-return].

cases.judge_reason: The agent response explicitly states that the refund will be issued to the original payment method within 5 to 7 business days after the return is received and inspected, fully matching the criteria.
cases.response: Once we receive and inspect your return, your refund will go back to your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days [policy-returns-refunds]. You'll get a confirmation email when the refund is issued.

cases.judge_reason: The response states the 7.50 USD return shipping fee deducted from the refund and explicitly states it is waived for damaged, defective, or not-as-ordered (incorrect) items, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, there's a flat 7.50 USD return shipping fee that gets deducted from your refund when you use our prepaid label [policy-returns-return-shipping-cost]. However, the fee is waived entirely if your item arrived damaged, defective, or not as ordered [policy-returns-return-shipping-cost].

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly states that spending at least $75 USD qualifies for free standard shipping, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: You need to spend at least 75 USD to get free standard shipping [policy-shipping-domestic-shipping-options]. If your order is under that amount, standard shipping costs 6.95 USD.

cases.judge_reason: The agent response states that expedited shipping costs 14.95 USD and arrives in 2 business days, matching the criteria exactly.
cases.response: Expedited shipping is 14.95 USD and arrives in 2 business days [policy-shipping-domestic-shipping-options].

cases.judge_reason: The response states international shipping is currently limited to Canada plus domestic US shipping, and clearly states India is not available, without promising India shipping.
cases.response:
We don't ship to India. Currently, we only ship internationally to Canada [policy-shipping-international-shipping]. For domestic US orders, we ship from our warehouse in Denver, Colorado [policy-shipping-overview].

If you have questions about shipping to other countries or want to explore options, please reach out to support@auroraoutfitters.com.

cases.judge_reason: The response states the gear comes with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects from delivery date, and explicitly notes that normal wear and tear (and misuse/accident damage) is not covered, satisfying both parts of the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, Aurora Outfitters brand gear comes with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects from the date of delivery [policy-returns-warranty]. This covers defects in materials or workmanship, but normal wear and tear, misuse, and accident damage aren't covered. If you think you have a defective item, you can reach out with photos and we'll help you get it sorted.

cases.judge_reason: The response explains that the price adjustment applies within 14 days of the order date and that the difference is refunded to the original payment method, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, you can! If the jacket dropped in price within 14 days of your order date, we'll refund the difference to your original payment method [policy-faq-price-adjustments]. Just reach out to support@auroraoutfitters.com with your order details and they'll process it for you.

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly states 'No, gift cards never expire', which directly satisfies the criteria.
cases.response: No, gift cards never expire [policy-faq-gift-cards]. They also carry no fees and can be used across multiple orders whenever you're ready to shop.

cases.judge_reason: The agent response provides the support email address (support@auroraoutfitters.com) and states the hours as Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Mountain Time, which satisfies the criteria.
cases.response: You can email support@auroraoutfitters.com Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Mountain Time [policy-faq-contacting-support]. We answer every message within 1 business day, and including your order number will help us get you the fastest help [policy-faq-contacting-support].

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Stormline Rain Jacket, describes it as waterproof, and includes accurate catalog details (2.5-layer shell, taped seams, pit zips, packable) without needing to mention every feature.
cases.response: Yes, we do! The Stormline Rain Jacket is a waterproof shell that works great for hiking [stormline-rain-jacket]. It's a 2.5-layer design with fully taped seams and pit zips to help manage heat on the climb. The whole thing packs into its own chest pocket, so it's easy to carry. We have sizes S through XL in stock at 179.99 USD.
The Stormline Rain Jacket is $179.99 [stormline-rain-jacket]. It comes in sizes S, M, L, and XL, and we have stock available in all of them.

cases.judge_reason: The agent confirms that the Stormline Rain Jacket is available in medium, stating stock of 13 units, which satisfies the criteria of confirming the size is in stock and available.
cases.response: Yes, the Stormline Rain Jacket is available in medium [stormline-rain-jacket]. We have 13 in stock, and it's priced at 179.99 USD.

cases.judge_reason: The response states the snowboard is currently out of stock, mentions the waitlist as an option, and does not claim it can be purchased right now. All criteria are satisfied.
cases.response: The Out of Stock Snowboard is currently out of stock [the-out-of-stock-snowboard]. However, you can join the waitlist since restocks tend to sell through quickly [the-out-of-stock-snowboard].

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent with a citation and provides plausible catalog-matching details (freestanding, three-season, two doors/vestibules, weight, setup time, colors, price) consistent with typical product info, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: The Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent is a great choice for two people [summit-ridge-2-person-tent]. It's a freestanding three-season tent that sets up in under ten minutes, and the best part is it has two doors with separate vestibules so you're not climbing over your tent mate at 2 am. It weighs just 2.1 kg and packs down to fit between two hikers, making it ideal for backpacking trips. We have it in stock in Forest Green and Burnt Orange, both priced at 289.99 USD.

cases.judge_reason: The response mentions the Ember 750 Sleeping Bag and states its 15 F comfort limit, satisfying the given criteria.
cases.response:
We carry the Ember 750 Sleeping Bag [ember-750-sleeping-bag], which is a 750-fill down mummy bag with a 15 F comfort limit. It's pretty lightweight at just 860 grams, making it great for backpacking, and it comes with both a compression sack for the trail and a storage sack for home [ember-750-sleeping-bag]. It's available in Regular and Long sizes, both priced at $249.99 [ember-750-sleeping-bag].

If you're looking for other options or need a different temperature rating, I'd recommend reaching out to support@auroraoutfitters.com and they can help you find what works best for your needs.

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Glacier Point Down Parka and includes the specified matching details: 700-fill down insulation and comfort rating down to about -15 C, as required by the criteria.
cases.response:
The Glacier Point Down Parka is your best bet for serious winter warmth [glacier-point-down-parka]. It's filled with 700-fill down and has an insulated hood, so it'll keep you comfortable standing around camp down to about -15 C when you layer it. It's priced at 329.99 USD and we have sizes M, L, and XL in stock.

If you need something lighter for milder conditions or layering, the Stormline Rain Jacket is a great waterproof shell [stormline-rain-jacket], but the down parka is really the one built for deep winter camping.

Yes, we do sell trekking poles! The Ridgeline Trekking Poles are 245 g per pole [ridgeline-trekking-poles], and they come as a pair for $89.95. They feature telescoping aluminum construction with flick locks, natural cork grips, and carbide tips that work well on rock and ice. We have 19 pairs in stock right now.

cases.judge_reason: The response confirms gift cards can be purchased and that they are digital, delivered by email within minutes. It does not claim they are out of stock or unavailable, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, you can! Aurora Outfitters offers digital gift cards that are delivered by email, usually within minutes of purchase [policy-faq-gift-cards]. They're available in 10, 25, 50, and 100 USD denominations, and they never expire or carry any fees [policy-faq-gift-cards]. Your brother can use the gift card across multiple orders whenever he's ready to shop.
